data.content:
Use `--filter` to target the class by its fully qualified name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

Or more simply, filter by class name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~ReportExporterTests"
```
